what: Build knowledge index for the newly registered vault
why: Make vault content searchable immediately after registration
output: Knowledge index file with searchable entries from the vault

success_handling.criteria: knowledge-index-build flow completes successfully and index file is created

event.message: Knowledge index built successfully for vault

error_handling.criteria: knowledge-index-build flow exits with non-zero code
error_handling.action: Log warning, complete registration without index (can rebuild later)

event.message: Index build failed, vault registered without index: {error}

decisions.outcome: Registration complete with full search capability
Registration completes with warning, user can rebuild index later
